title: crataegus calycina subsp. curvisepala
intro: Crataegus calycina subsp. curvisepala, also known as the Himalayan hawthorn, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region. This deciduous shrub or small tree has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Crataegus calycina subsp. curvisepala include reducing high blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to extract its medicinal compounds and provide relief from various health issues.
